message:
fix: update DynamicCard test expectations to match i18n key output (#5795)

All 13 DynamicCard test assertions updated from raw English strings to
i18n key strings since the component now uses t() calls.

Fixes #5794

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
